features.name: packed struct literal assignment with constants bypasses disallowPackedStructAssignments
features.description: Code should include a packed struct type being assigned via struct literal constructor where all field values are compile-time constants, which incorrectly bypasses the disallowPackedStructAssignments lowering option
features.snippet:
struct packed {logic [7:0] x; logic y; } O;
assign O = '{x: 8'hBE, y: 1'h1};
